residents_comments: Office staff perceived as abandoning residents
Bus schedules to grocery store available
Posting of flyers and information on bulletin boards
Concerns about ants and pest control
executive_directors_report: Board requested brief presentation concerning T-Mobile next meeting
Office staff will be teleworking until further notice
Joey (maintenance) is working all day on Tuesdays and Thursdays
Working on a call system with Gilson
Residents have been instructed to mail in their rent or put them in the drop box
Late fees and evictions are being waived
Tissue, face masks, and food has been ordered for emergency usage
Property cameras have been updated to allow staff to watch the cameras via remote 24 hours a day
The building is being cleaned 3 times a week by 2 different companies
decisions: Unanimously approved the minutes from the regular monthly meeting on February 27, 2020 4-0
Adjourned the regular monthly meeting and went into executive session 3-0
